name: de Blob
post_apply_message: de Blob — 3 intro videos renamed to .gfm-orig. Note the odd .bik.ogv extension (THQ Nordic port pattern). PCGW does not document a widescreen fix (game runs pillarboxed 16:9 at desktop resolution) — this recipe only covers the intros.
notes: Intro skip only. Wii port, filenames end in .bik.ogv (repackaged Bink as Ogg Vorbis). PCGW confirms no widescreen fix exists — the game engine is stuck at 16:9 pillarboxed. If someone releases a widescreen ASI later, add it as a copy_files step. Filenames from PCGW.
